title: BetterDeath
description: Better Death enhances Minecraft’s death screen with a clean, informative summary of what happened.
body:
# Better Death

---

- Better Death enhances Minecraft’s death screen with a clean, informative summary of what happened—without clutter or unnecessary buttons.

*   players are shown a helpful overview of their last moments.

***

## Features:

*   Displays your last death location (X, Y, Z + dimension)
*   Shows your inventory at time of death
*   Clean, minimal info card
*   Fully Client side and no dependency mods!
*   Hardcore mode if you die it will say "Game Over"

***

## Purpose

Designed to help players:

*   Identify and recall exactly what you had on you on death.
*   Remember where you died !
*   Reduce frustration after death!

***

## Keep immersion intact!

## Philosophy

No shortcuts. No clutter. Just clarity.


_minimaps and other mods are nice and all but this keeps that QoL Vanilla feel without stepping out of the comfortzone_.

***

## Compatibility

*   Currently for 1.21.1 _More could come available with time and need/requests_
*   Works on singleplayer and multiplayer
*   Lightweight and performance-friendly
